style_authority.note: Preserves a calm repeated-use operations surface, but introduces an unsupported desktop and keyboard-heavy staff assumption.

reference_selection.note: Selects motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, accessibility, property cost, interruption, and browser-device validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Questions motion purpose first, retains causal drag and settle feedback, and rejects transition-all, layout movement, scale, long ease-in travel, and lockout.

evidence_level.note: Labels the result as static-source evidence and declines to claim smoothness, frame rate, computed styles, touch feel, reduced-motion behavior, or interruption outcomes.

verified_boundary.note: Separates explicit code facts from unverified lag, grab jumps, layout cost, animation conflicts, frame drops, pointer capture, and physical touch feel.

design_moves.note: Passes measured release velocity into settling, but does not make expected snap-target hysteresis explicit in the implementation moves.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, motion-specific, and prioritized with five blockers and eight moves in 94 logical lines, below the 150-line cap.
